title: FabCrate
description: This modpack is about create and it's Fabric version with shaders and mods like iris, Indium, Sodium for an optimised gameplay experience
body:
# Welcome to FabCreate!
This modpack is about Create and it includes a few mods like
Indium (For Create to work with Sodium.), Sodium, Iris shaders

# Why Download the modpack?
I've made this modpack with an intention of improuving User experience, but also with the itention to make it easier to make an modpack about create.

# Insporations
Just Create SMP modpack | Huge insporation
Create Shaders | Semi-Insporation
